task: Find Farms land in Wilkes County, NC with the lowest price.
graderReasoning: The agent searched LandWatch for Wilkes County, NC, applied the 'Farms and Ranches' property type filter, and reached the results page showing 4 matching listings. The filtered results snapshot clearly shows the lowest-priced farm/ranch listing as '$48,888 6.5 acres' at '149 Chestnut Street, North Wilkesboro, NC, 28659, Wilkes County.' The agent then opened that listing detail page, where the page title and content confirm it is a 'Farms and Ranches' listing, available for $48,888, 6.5 acres, at that address. The final answer matches the on-page evidence, including the PID-derived link.
final_result_response:
Lowest-priced Farms and Ranches listing I found on LandWatch for Wilkes County, NC:

- Price: $48,888
- Size: 6.5 acres
- Address: 149 Chestnut Street, North Wilkesboro, NC 28659
- Type: Farms and Ranches
- Status: Available
- Listing title: “6.5 Acres Land in Gated Community with Electricity & Internet & Paved Roads”
- Seller/contact: Matt Dagli, (336) 656-2912
- Link: https://www.landwatch.com/wilkes-county-north-carolina-farms-and-ranches-for-sale/pid/426366305

There were 4 Farms and Ranches listings total, and this was the only one under $50,000.
action_history: Opening LandWatch: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.landwatch.com/');
Searching Wilkes County farms: await page.locator('e13').click();
Entering Wilkes County: await page.locator('e133').fill('Wilkes County, NC');
Filtering to farms and ranches: await page.locator('e216').click();
Opening lowest priced listing: await page.locator('e515').click();
